items.badge_description: Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 465 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 94!
Untappd’s top style of 2021 deserves a top badge. The first in our series of “Super Style” badges, this one celebrates the amazing American IPA. AVAILABLE ONLY TO UNTAPPD INSIDERS!

items.checkin_comment: On the way to being a true-to-style English IPA but just missing a bit of body and a bit of caramel-y maltiness.

items.badge_description: Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 460 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 93!
Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 175 distinct venues!

Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 75 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 16!

Round and round the wheel goes! Which style you’ll be drinking, nobody knows! Your desire to explore different styles is inspiring. Keep it up! That's a check-in to at least 105 different styles. Try 5 more for Level 22!
